episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Yudhishthira walks toward enemy side barefoot

episodes.title_hint: Yudhishthira bows to Bhishma before battle
episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Bhishma grants a boon — what does he ask?

episodes.title_hint: Bhishma's boon revealed — the secret weapon
episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Arjuna raises Gandiva against his grandfather
Karna sees Kunti on the battlefield
Karna makes a promise that will cost him everything

episodes.title_hint: Draupadi's vow — hair unbound until revenge

episodes.cliffhanger_setup: The trap closes — 7 warriors surround one boy

episodes.title_hint: Arjuna learns his son is dead
episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Arjuna swears to kill Jayadratha by sunset or burn himself

episodes.title_hint: Krishna hides the sun — the impossible sunset
episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Jayadratha laughs — then the sun reappears

episodes.title_hint: Bhishma falls — the grandfather chooses his moment
episodes.cliffhanger_setup: Bhishma on the bed of arrows — asks for a pillow
